Title: Vessel Manager
Description: Satbir never expected to go from fixing engines to managing entire ships. As a vessel manager, Satbir balances crew wellbeing, vessel performance optimisation, budgets and sustainability.

Title: Talent Development and Human Capital Manager
Description: From hiring to developing capacity for leadership, Rachael's career in human resources (HR) goes beyond policies - it's about building people and helping them go further.

Title: Research Analyst Manager (Maritime)
Description: Fang Yi uses real-time data to unlock smarter decisions, turning insights into impact.

Title: Actress
Description: Watch an exclusive behind the scnes with Ah Yoke from the cast of Mediacorp drama 'Kin', as she shows you what it takes to be an Actress.

Title: Prison Officer
Description: Being a prison officer, Elvis finds meaning in his interactions with inmates, engaging in guided conversations and supporting them on their rehabilitative journey.

Title: MedTech Engineer
Description: MedTech Engineer Jae Hann stabilises and automates production of 4D-printed orthopaedic casts: fixing printers, expediting manufacturing, and setting up processes for scaled production.

Title: Robotics Engineer
Description: Robotics Engineer Zefan Huang designs and tests autonomous vehicles and robots that aid people with limited mobility.
Worlds: Informed World, Safe World, Inclusive World

Title: Scientist Entrepreneur (BioTech)
Description: Scientist Entrepreneurs use research to launch startups - turning lab discoveries into new therapies, like targeted treatments for aggressive cancers that improve patient outcomes.

Title: Research Technician (BioTech)
Description: Ria and Samirah work as Research Technicians in BioTech, focusing on advancing cancer therapeutics. They analyse results to develop new treatments - like using stem cells to help animals recover from cancer.
